dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6347 IH: Global Child Thrive Reauthorization Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Castro of Texas (for himself, Mr. McCormick, Mr. Olszewski, and Mr. Fitzpatrick) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To reauthorize the Global Child Thrive Act of 2020, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Global Child Thrive Reauthorization Act of 2025.

section.header: Appointment of Special Advisor for Assistance to Orphans and Vulnerable Children
section.text: Not later than 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Secretary of State shall appoint a Special Advisor for Assistance to Orphans and Vulnerable Children, pursuant to section 135(e)(1) of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 (22 U.S.C. 2152f(e)(1)).

section.header: Extension of requirement to issue implementing directives
section.text: Section 137(c) of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 (22 U.S.C. 2152k(c)) is amended by inserting and 6 years after 1 year.
Section 1283(a) of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 (Public Law 116–283; referred to as the Global Child Thrive Act of 2020) is amended by striking 2025 and inserting 2030.
